notable_excerpts: Tech Mahindra has again been recognized as a Global Sustainability Leader in the S&P Global Dow Jones Sustainability Index.
We have proudly regained our #1 position globally in the TSV IT services segment.
We have also been included in the prestigious A-list for both the Carbon Disclosure Project Climate Change and the CDP Water Stewardship 2025.
Launch of our new culture model, 'Limitless Together,' which brings our employees, our employee value proposition to life.
Our refreshed brand encapsulates who Tech Mahindra is in the AI era, agile in execution, bold in vision, collaborative in culture and with clients.
The quality of the leadership team that we have assembled.
This intimation is also available on the website of the Company at the weblink.

chain_of_thought: The environmental pillar is strong with recognitions in sustainability indices and commitments to carbon and water stewardship. Social aspects are addressed through employee engagement initiatives and brand positioning. Governance disclosures are less detailed, focusing on leadership quality and transparency.
